---
title: "Teaching"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
---




#### Teaching

+ MTH 017 Linear Algebra for Mathematical Science 
+ MTH 002 Multivariable Calculus and Statistics, Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University
+ MTH 007 Linear Algebra, Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University
+ Stats3Y03/3J04  Probability and Statistics for Engineering, McMaster University

#### SURF 2022

#### Final Year Project 

+ [Final Year Project Website](https://hemu0626.github.io/Final-Year-Project/)
